title: Bare Bones x Armor Trim Item Fix
description: Redesigns armor trim item textures to align with the Bare Bones aesthetic, ensuring a cohesive visual experience.
body: [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/CurseForge-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=black)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-x-armor-trim-item-fix) [![Profile](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-Profile-0?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=teal)](https://modrinth.com/user/PrincParshia) --- ## 📗 DESCRIPTION Modifies the textures from the Armor Trim... Fix mod to match the clean, minimalist style of the Bare Bones texture pack. This update ensures the armor trim items seamlessly align with Bare Bones' aesthetic, creating a consistent visual experience throughout the game. ---
